data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of dual-sided rewards, where both the referrer and referee receive rewards. However, the evidence only confirms that the referrer (Sarah) receives a reward ($25 account credit) but does not provide any information about the referee receiving a reward. The linked use case mentions a 20% discount for the friend who booked, but it does not explicitly confirm that this is a reward given as part of the referral program, leading to a gap in evidence for the requirement of dual-sided rewards being satisfied.
gaps: No evidence that the referee receives a reward as part of the dual-sided rewards requirement.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Verify referee reward assignment
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Check if the referee receives a reward upon booking completion.
